steps.title: Separate claim from example
steps.content: The first sentence gives the broad idea: conservation initiatives that rely on natural features or processes can help protect ecosystems. The Quinault River logjams are then presented as one example of that larger nature-based conservation approach helping blueback salmon recover.

steps.title: Avoid detail-only claims
steps.content: Choice A overemphasizes partnership, Choice B names only the salmon-logjam example, and Choice C adds an unsupported comparison to non-nature-based methods. The main idea must capture the general effectiveness of nature-based conservation. The answer is D.
